0000100010001011 0111101111001111 0 -> sum: 1000010001011010, cout: 0
0011001011011111 1111100111000010 1 -> sum: 0010110010100010, cout: 1
1100010001011010 0001111011100111 0 -> sum: 1110001101000001, cout: 0
1000101010111010 0010100101100010 1 -> sum: 1011010000011101, cout: 0
0101010011110001 1101101010101111 1 -> sum: 0010111110100001, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

1111111111111111 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
